messages.content: # Is your camera pointing backwards without you pressing anything? Follow this guide!

# Step 1:
> Open file explorer and go to **Documents/Assetto Corsa** (*not your root folder*) and rename the “cfg” folder to "cfg_old" and restart Content Manager

# Step 2:
> Rebind your controls **manually**:
> * **Wheel**: <#1322253669751591043>
> * **Controller**: <#1322254966953476218>
> * **Keyboard**: <#1322255308776538243>

# Step 3:
> Open Content Manager > Settings > Assetto Corsa > Controls > Buttons *or* Additional > View
> 
> Assign:
> 1. Glance Left
> 2. Glance Right
> 3. Glance Back
> 4. Change Camera

# Step 4:
> Open Content Manager > Settings > Assetto Corsa > Controls > Patch > Neck FX
> 
> Assign:
> 1. Look Left
> 2. Look Right
> 3. Look Back
